summary: Completed frontend testing of MatchMaker 'Skip for now' state-wise view feature. All 6 test cases passed. The feature correctly shows professionals grouped by state alphabetically when 'Skip for now' is clicked, state sections are collapsible/expandable, view toggle buttons work correctly, and city selection filters professionals by city.
passed_tests: 1. Click on category (Chartered Accountants) - city selection dialog appears - PASS
2. City selection dialog groups cities by state alphabetically (Andhra Pradesh, Bihar, Chandigarh, Delhi, Gujarat, Haryana...) - PASS
3. 'Skip for now - Show All (State-wise)' button visible and clickable - PASS
4. After clicking 'Skip for now', professionals are grouped by state alphabetically - PASS
5. State sections are collapsible/expandable (click state header to toggle) - PASS
6. View toggle buttons work: 'City View' opens city dialog, 'All States' shows state-wise view - PASS
7. Click on specific city (Mumbai) - only professionals from that city are shown - PASS
8. Header shows 'All India (State-wise)' when in state-wise view - PASS
9. Header shows 'in {CityName}' when city is selected - PASS
10. Breadcrumb shows 'All States' when in state-wise view - PASS
test_credentials: Session created via mongosh for test-user-* (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing demo data (Priya Mehta - CA, Vikram Kapoor - Merchant Banker)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MatchMaker state-wise view feature is fully functional. Key test IDs: 'skip-for-now-btn' for Skip button, 'city-{cityname}' for city buttons. The state-wise view shows collapsible sections with state name as header. View toggle buttons are labeled 'City View' and 'All States'. Cities in dialog are grouped by state using CITY_TO_STATE mapping in MatchMakerSearch.jsx.

city_selection_dialog.description: Dialog appears when clicking category, cities grouped by state alphabetically

skip_for_now_button.description: Button shows all professionals grouped by state when clicked

state_wise_grouping.description: Professionals grouped by state alphabetically (Maharashtra, Karnataka, etc.)

collapsible_state_sections.description: Click state header to expand/collapse professional list

view_toggle_buttons.description: 'City View' opens city dialog, 'All States' shows state-wise view

city_filter.description: Clicking city shows only professionals from that city

ui_verification.state_wise_view_header: Shows 'All India (State-wise)' and 'Organized alphabetically by state'
ui_verification.toggle_buttons: 'City View' and 'All States' buttons visible in header
